name: @pryzm/plugin-wall
description: PRYZM 2 — Wall plugin.  Headless half (S07): Store<WallData>, system-type catalogue, typed errors, 5 handlers.  Producer (S08): pure-TS BufferGeometryDescriptor producer.  Committer + tool + selection-highlight (S09): THREE-touching scene reification under `src/committer/`, vanilla-TS WallCreationTool (Straight mode).  Remaining 9 handlers + Arc/Polyline tool modes land S10.
